attributes.description: UniFi WAN firewall activity — inbound probes, attack types, source IPs, and active firewall policies
attributes.optionsJSON: {"hidePanelTitles": false, "hidePanelBorders": false, "useMargins": true, "autoApplyFilters": true, "syncColors": false, "syncCursor": true, "syncTooltips": false, "dynamicOptions": {}}

TO_STRING(`source.ip`) | WHERE src != "142.56.57.103" AND src IS NOT NULL | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "bh_x", "fieldName": "src", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Source IP", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "bh_y", "fieldName": "count", "meta": {"type": "number"}, "label": "Events", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-top-src", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 20, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "fw-top-src"}}, {"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Top "null" | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "bh_x", "fieldName": "port", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Port", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "bh_y", "fieldName": "count", "meta": {"type": "number"}, "label": "Events", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "fw-events", "name": "indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-top-ports"}], "visualization": {"preferredSeriesType": "bar_horizontal", "legend": {"isVisible": false, "position": "right", "legendSize": "auto"}, "layers": [{"layerId": "bh_fw-top-ports", "accessors": ["bh_y"], "layerType": "data", "seriesType": "bar_horizontal", "xAccessor": "bh_x"}]}, "adHocDataViews": {"fw-events": {"id": "fw-events", "title": "logs-unifi.events-*", "name": "logs-unifi.events-*", "sourceFilters": [], "fieldFormats": {}, "runtimeFieldMap": {}, "fieldAttrs": {}, "allowNoIndex": false, "allowHidden": false, "type": "esql"}}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall" | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY port = TO_STRING(`destination.port`) | WHERE port IS NOT NULL AND port != "null" | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-top-ports", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 20, "w": 24, "h": 14, "i": "fw-top-ports"}}, {"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Attack Type Breakdown", "attributes": {"visualizationType": "lnsXY", "title": "Attack Type Breakdown", "references": [], "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"bh_fw-attack-type": {"index": "fw-events", "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall"
| EVAL attack_type = CASE(
    `network.transport` == "ICMP", "Ping Sweep",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "22",   "SSH Brute Force",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "3389", "RDP Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "23",   "Telnet Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "5900", "VNC Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "443",  "HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "80",   "HTTP Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8443", "Admin HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8080", "HTTP Alt Probe",
    "Other"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attack_type | SORT count DESC"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "bh_x", "fieldName": "attack_type", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Attack Type", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "bh_y", "fieldName": "count", "meta": {"type": "number"}, "label": "Events", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "fw-events", "name": "indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-attack-type"}], "visualization": {"preferredSeriesType": "bar_horizontal", "legend": {"isVisible": false, "position": "right", "legendSize": "auto"}, "layers": [{"layerId": "bh_fw-attack-type", "accessors": ["bh_y"], "layerType": "data", "seriesType": "bar_horizontal", "xAccessor": "bh_x"}]}, "adHocDataViews": {"fw-events": {"id": "fw-events", "title": "logs-unifi.events-*", "name": "logs-unifi.events-*", "sourceFilters": [], "fieldFormats": {}, "runtimeFieldMap": {}, "fieldAttrs": {}, "allowNoIndex": false, "allowHidden": false, "type": "esql"}}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall"
| EVAL attack_type = CASE(
    `network.transport` == "ICMP", "Ping Sweep",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "22",   "SSH Brute Force",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "3389", "RDP Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "23",   "Telnet Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "5900", "VNC Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "443",  "HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "80",   "HTTP Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8443", "Admin HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8080", "HTTP Alt Probe",
    "Other"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attack_type | SORT count DESC"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-attack-type", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 34, "w": 24, "h": 12, "i": "fw-attack-type"}}, {"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Firewall Policy Rules by Zone", "attributes": {"visualizationType": "lnsXY", "title": "Firewall Policy Rules by Zone", "references": [], "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"bh_fw-policy-summary": {"index": "fw-policy", "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, zone = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name` | EVAL zone_action = CONCAT(action, ": ", zone) | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "bh_x", "fieldName": "zone_action", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Zone → Action", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "bh_y", "fieldName": "count", "meta": {"type": "number"}, "label": "Rules", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "fw-policy", "name": "indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-policy-summary"}], "visualization": {"preferredSeriesType": "bar_horizontal", "legend": {"isVisible": false, "position": "right", "legendSize": "auto"}, "layers": [{"layerId": "bh_fw-policy-summary", "accessors": ["bh_y"], "layerType": "data", "seriesType": "bar_horizontal", "xAccessor": "bh_x"}]}, "adHocDataViews": {"fw-policy": {"id": "fw-policy", "title": "logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*", "name": "logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*", "sourceFilters": [], "fieldFormats": {}, "runtimeFieldMap": {}, "fieldAttrs": {}, "allowNoIndex": false, "allowHidden": false, "type": "esql"}}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, zone = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name` | EVAL zone_action = CONCAT(action, ": ", zone) | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-policy-summary", "gridData": {"x": 24, "y": 34, "w": 24, "h": 12, "i": "fw-policy-summary"}}, {"type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"title": "Active Firewall Policies", "attributes": {"visualizationType": "lnsDatatable", "title": "Active Firewall Policies", "references": [], "state": {"datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"tbl_fw-policy-table": {"index": "fw-policy", "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES AND `unifi.firewall_policy.enabled` == true
| STATS cnt = COUNT(*) BY
    name    = `unifi.firewall_policy.name`,
    action  = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`,
    src     = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name`,
    dst     = `unifi.firewall_policy.destination.zone_name`,
    origin  = `unifi.firewall_policy.origin`,
    logging = `unifi.firewall_policy.logging_enabled`
| SORT action ASC, name ASC | LIMIT 100"}, "columns": [{"columnId": "tbl_name", "fieldName": "name", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Rule Name", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "tbl_action", "fieldName": "action", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Action", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "tbl_src", "fieldName": "src", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Source Zone", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "tbl_dst", "fieldName": "dst", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Destination Zone", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "tbl_origin", "fieldName": "origin", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Origin", "customLabel": true}, {"columnId": "tbl_log", "fieldName": "logging", "meta": {"type": "string"}, "label": "Logging", "customLabel": true}]}}}}, "internalReferences": [{"type": "index-pattern", "id": "fw-policy", "name": "indexpattern-datasource-layer-tbl_fw-policy-table"}], "visualization": {"layerId": "tbl_fw-policy-table", "layerType": "data", "columns": [{"columnId": "tbl_name", "isTransposed": false, "isMetric": false}, {"columnId": "tbl_action", "isTransposed": false, "isMetric": false}, {"columnId": "tbl_src", "isTransposed": false, "isMetric": false}, {"columnId": "tbl_dst", "isTransposed": false, "isMetric": false}, {"columnId": "tbl_origin", "isTransposed": false, "isMetric": false}, {"columnId": "tbl_log", "isTransposed": false, "isMetric": false}]}, "adHocDataViews": {"fw-policy": {"id": "fw-policy", "title": "logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*", "name": "logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*", "sourceFilters": [], "fieldFormats": {}, "runtimeFieldMap": {}, "fieldAttrs": {}, "allowNoIndex": false, "allowHidden": false, "type": "esql"}}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES AND `unifi.firewall_policy.enabled` == true
| STATS cnt = COUNT(*) BY
    name    = `unifi.firewall_policy.name`,
    action  = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`,
    src     = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name`,
    dst     = `unifi.firewall_policy.destination.zone_name`,
    origin  = `unifi.firewall_policy.origin`,
    logging = `unifi.firewall_policy.logging_enabled`
| SORT action ASC, name ASC | LIMIT 100"}, "filters": []}}}, "panelIndex": "fw-policy-table", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 64, "w": 48, "h": 14, "i": "fw-policy-table"}}, {"type": "visualization", "embeddableConfig": {"savedVis": {"id": "", "title": "Zone Policy Matrix", "description": "Firewall policy actions between each source and destination zone", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{
  "$schema": "https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json",
  "background": "#16161f",
  "padding": {
    "top": 30,
    "left": 110,
    "right": 20,
    "bottom": 70
  },
  "autosize": {
    "type": "fit",
    "contains": "padding"
  },
  "data": [
    {
      "name": "raw",
      "url": {
        "%type%": "esql",
        "query": "FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES AND `unifi.firewall_policy.enabled` == true | EVAL is_allow = CASE(`unifi.firewall_policy.action.type` == \"ALLOW\", 1, 0), is_block = CASE(`unifi.firewall_policy.action.type` == \"BLOCK\", 1, 0) | STATS cnt = COUNT(*), allow_cnt = SUM(is_allow), block_cnt = SUM(is_block) BY src = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name`, dst = `unifi.firewall_policy.destination.zone_name` | SORT src ASC, dst ASC"
      },
      "transform": [
        {
          "type": "formula",
          "as": "state",
          "expr": "datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? 'mixed' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? 'allow' : 'block'"
        },
        {
          "type": "formula",
          "as": "fill",
          "expr": "datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? '#0d3035' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? '#1a4d35' : '#4d1a1a'"
        },
        {
          "type": "formula",
          "as": "label_color",
          "expr": "datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? '#00acc1' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? '#2eb886' : '#e0434c'"
        },
        {
          "type": "formula",
          "as": "label",
          "expr": "datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? 'RETURN' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? 'ALLOW' : 'BLOCK'"
        },
        {
          "type": "formula",
          "as": "cnt_display",
          "expr": "datum.allow_cnt + datum.block_cnt"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "scales": [
    {
      "name": "x",
      "type": "band",
      "domain": {
        "data": "raw",
        "field": "dst",
        "sort": true
      },
      "range": "width",
      "padding": 0.06
    },
    {
      "name": "y",
      "type": "band",
      "domain": {
        "data": "raw",
        "field": "src",
        "sort": true
      },
      "range": "height",
      "padding": 0.06
    }
  ],
  "axes": [
    {
      "orient": "bottom",
      "scale": "x",
      "title": "Destination Zone",
      "titleColor": "#b0b4c2",
      "titleFontSize": 12,
      "titlePadding": 12,
      "labelColor": "#b0b4c2",
      "labelFontSize": 11,
      "labelAngle": -25,
      "labelAlign": "right"
    },
    {
      "orient": "left",
      "scale": "y",
      "title": "Source Zone",
      "titleColor": "#b0b4c2",
      "titleFontSize": 12,
      "titlePadding": 10,
      "labelColor": "#b0b4c2",
      "labelFontSize": 11
    }
  ],
  "marks": [
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "from": {
        "data": "raw"
      },
      "encode": {
        "enter": {
          "x": {
            "scale": "x",
            "field": "dst"
          },
          "width": {
            "scale": "x",
            "band": 1
          },
          "y": {
            "scale": "y",
            "field": "src"
          },
          "height": {
            "scale": "y",
            "band": 1
          },
          "fill": {
            "field": "fill"
          },
          "stroke": {
            "value": "#333"
          },
          "strokeWidth": {
            "value": 1
          },
          "cornerRadius": {
            "value": 6
          },
          "tooltip": {
            "signal": "{'Source Zone': datum.src, 'Destination Zone': datum.dst, 'Policy': datum.label, 'Allow Rules': datum.allow_cnt, 'Block Rules': datum.block_cnt}"
          }
        },
        "hover": {
          "stroke": {
            "value": "#aaa"
          },
          "strokeWidth": {
            "value": 2
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "from": {
        "data": "raw"
      },
      "encode": {
        "enter": {
          "x": {
            "scale": "x",
            "field": "dst",
            "band": 0.5
          },
          "y": {
            "scale": "y",
            "field": "src",
            "band": 0.38
          },
          "align": {
            "value": "center"
          },
          "baseline": {
            "value": "middle"
          },
          "text": {
            "field": "cnt_display"
          },
          "fontSize": {
            "value": 16
          },
          "fontWeight": {
            "value": "bold"
          },
          "fill": {
            "field": "label_color"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "from": {
        "data": "raw"
      },
      "encode": {
        "enter": {
          "x": {
            "scale": "x",
            "field": "dst",
            "band": 0.5
          },
          "y": {
            "scale": "y",
            "field": "src",
            "band": 0.68
          },
          "align": {
            "value": "center"
          },
          "baseline": {
            "value": "middle"
          },
          "text": {
            "field": "label"
          },
          "fontSize": {
            "value": 9
          },
          "fontStyle": {
            "value": "italic"
          },
          "fill": {
            "field": "label_color"
          },
          "opacity": {
            "value": 0.8
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {}}}, "enhancements": {}, "hide_title": false}, "panelIndex": "fw-zone-matrix", "title": "Zone Policy Matrix", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 46, "w": 48, "h": 18, "i": "fw-zone-matrix"}}]
